description:
Two options:
1. Add telescope-fzf-native extension for faster sorting (minimal change)
2. Switch to fzf-lua entirely (faster for large repos, drop-in replacement)

Option 1 is lower risk. Option 2 is higher reward for large codebases.

Affected file: `home-modules/editors/neovim/navigation/telescope.nix`
title: Improve Telescope performance or switch to fzf-lua
